title: PS1 Discovery Corpus
description: A multilingual metadata corpus of 7,995 PlayStation 1 games, built to be searched by feel (e.g. "a cozy fishing game with an anime aesthetic") rather than by popularity or rigid filters, with a deliberate bias toward obscure and Japan-exclusive titles. Every row carries an original, evidence-grounded short description and a set of controlled-vocabulary tags (mood, setting, mechanics, cultural lineage, quality) on top of facts reconciled from 30+ sources across 11 languages. 7,995 rows × 127 columns, CSV + Parquet, released under CC BY-SA 4.0. Canonical source and full documentation: https://github.com/kenrinzero/ps1-discovery-corpus
